case_title: STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA,A PUBLIC CORPORATION VS. BARBARA BROWN-SIMMONS et al

docket_entries.description: RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA,A PUBLIC CORPORATION

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-20-2004 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE SEP-03-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-20-2004 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
